title: leucocoma dioica
intro: Leucocoma dioica, also known as the White Thyme, is a species of flowering plant in the family Compositae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Leucocoma dioica include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Leucocoma dioica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in traditional herbal medicine.
